How do I keep pasta from sticking?
What should I do for a minor burn?
How do I read a chord like Cmaj7?
Why are my tomato leaves curling?
My car won't start and just clicks — why?
Why did the Roman Empire fall?

Quick way to tell if a number divides by 3?

a: A taut-line hitch on the ridgeline — it grips under load but slides to re-tension when the wind picks up. For the corners, a prusik loop lets you adjust without untying.

Salt the water well and stir in the first minute, when the starch is gummiest. Don't add oil — it just coats the strands so the sauce slides off. Save a little pasta water to bring the sauce together.
Cool it under running water for 20 minutes — no ice, no butter. Cover loosely with cling film or a clean cloth. If the blister is bigger than your palm, or it's on the face or hands, see a doctor.
Air scatters short blue wavelengths far more than red — Rayleigh scattering. At sunset the light travels through more air, the blue scatters away, and the warm reds reach your eyes.
Affect is almost always the verb (it affects you); effect is almost always the noun (the effect of it). Memory hook: the Action is Affect, the End result is Effect.
When two tasks touch shared data at the same time and the outcome depends on timing. You fix it by serializing access — a lock, a queue, or an atomic operation — so only one touches it at once.
Stack the 1st, 3rd, 5th and 7th notes of the C major scale: C – E – G – B. The 'maj7' means the seventh sits a half-step below the octave, giving that warm, open sound.
Usually heat or water stress, not disease — the leaf curls to lose less water. Mulch, water deeply in the morning, and rule out wind or weed-killer drift before treating for anything.
Interest that earns interest. $1,000 at 5% becomes $1,050; the next year you earn 5% on $1,050, not $1,000. Over decades that snowball dwarfs what you first put in.
A rapid clicking is usually a flat battery or a loose terminal, not the starter motor. Check the terminals are clean and tight, then try a jump start. One loud clunk instead points to the starter.

No single cause — decades of overextension, debased currency, civil wars, and pressure from migrating peoples. The western half fell in 476 CE; the eastern (Byzantine) half lasted another thousand years.
Water is densest at 4°C. As it freezes, the molecules lock into an open hexagonal lattice that takes up more room, so ice is about 9% less dense than liquid water — and floats.
Give a muscle group about 48 hours before training it hard again — that's when the repair and growth happen. Train other groups in between if you want to keep going.
Add up the digits; if that sum divides by 3, so does the number. For 1,233: 1+2+3+3 = 9, which divides by 3 — so 1,233 does too.
Shift toward the destination's clock a few days before you fly, get daylight on arrival, and don't nap — stay up until the local bedtime. Hydrate, and skip alcohol on the plane.
